summary: Iteration 183 testing complete: Dimensional Space (3D/4D/5D), Master View Audit Dashboard, and Collective Shadow Map. All 39 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI elements verified with correct data-testid attributes. Phase-shift gating works correctly (4D requires level 2, 5D requires level 3). Regression tests for Planetary Depths and Quantum Field passed.
critical_code_review_comments: dimensions.py correctly implements 12-cell multiverse grid (4 depths × 3 dimensions)
Phase-shift costs: ascending = 30 dust per dimension jump, descending = free
Collective Shadow Map uses MongoDB aggregation on quantum_shadows collection
Master View audit aggregates data from 8+ collections correctly
All new pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Navigation includes Depths, Quantum, Dimensions, Shadow Map, Master entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 183 Dimensional Space, Master View, and Collective Shadow Map all working. Test user has: consciousness_level=1, xp=272, dust=138. At level 1, only 3D dimension is accessible. 4D requires level 2, 5D requires level 3. Phase-shift costs 30 dust per dimension jump ascending, free descending. Collective Shadow Map shows empty state since no shadows have been collapsed yet. Master View shows comprehensive audit of all subsystems. Previous Planetary Depths and Quantum Field features still working (regression verified).

backend_apis.GET /api/dimensions/grid: Returns 12-cell grid with accessibility status based on consciousness level
backend_apis.POST /api/dimensions/phase-shift: Phase-shift between dimensions (gated by level, costs dust)
backend_apis.GET /api/dimensions/status: Returns current dimension, depth, cell_id, shift history
backend_apis.GET /api/dimensions/collective-shadow-ma: Returns global shadow collapse hotspots with stats
backend_apis.GET /api/master-view/audit: Returns comprehensive audit: player, stratigraphy, psyche, dimensional, quantum, frequency_scaling, subsystems, system_health
